mapper.insert: insert into knowledge ( user_id, category_id, title, content ) values ( #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content} )
mapper.select: select * from knowledge where user_id = #{userId} order by id desc
select * from knowledge where user_id = #{userId} and ( title like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') or content like concat('%',#{keyword},'%') ) order by id desc
